scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.dev:api: bash scripts/with-ruby.sh bash -c 'cd apps/api && bundle exec rails server'
scripts.db:setup: docker compose up -d db && bash scripts/with-ruby.sh bash -c 'cd apps/api && bundle exec rails db:create db:schema:load db:seed'
scripts.test:api: bash scripts/with-ruby.sh bash -c 'cd apps/api && bundle exec rails test'
scripts.test:api:prepare: bash scripts/with-ruby.sh bash -c 'cd apps/api && bundle exec rails db:test:prepare'
